## What does this PR do?

<!-- One sentence summary -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `add` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — code improvement, no behaviour change
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `test` — adding or fixing tests
- [ ] `chore` — build, deps, CI

## How to test

<!-- Steps to verify this works -->

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows `type(scope): description` format
- [ ] Branch name follows `type/description` format
- [ ] Unit tests pass (`task test:unit`)
- [ ] No new TypeScript errors (`task check`)
- [ ] Docker builds cleanly (`task run`)
- [ ] Relevant docs updated if behaviour changed
